page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg8i.3xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 12 dedicated physical cores using the Intel Xeon 6462C processor, operating at a clock speed of 3.3 GHz. With a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, each vCPU maps directly to a physical core, eliminating resource sharing at the thread level. The system is equipped with 48.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance does not include local storage or integrated GPU hardware, requiring external block storage for operating system and application data. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 10 Gbps. The hardware profile offers a balanced resource density, making it qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads that require dedicated processing power without the overhead of hyperthreading.

The dedicated core allocation and balanced memory-to-CPU ratio make this instance suitable for general-purpose workloads, application servers, containerized microservices, and medium-scale databases that benefit from predictable single-threaded CPU performance.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg8i.3xlarge is an x86_64 virtual server powered by the KVM hypervisor and equipped with 12 dedicated physical cores. It utilizes the Intel Xeon 6462C processor running at 3.3 GHz with a single thread per core, ensuring dedicated execution resources without hyperthreading overhead. The instance features 48.0 GB of system memory, establishing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio of 4.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU hardware, relying instead on network-attached storage, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps. This hardware configuration delivers predictable compute performance and balanced resource density, making it qualitatively cost-effective for production environments. The ecs.hfg8i.3xlarge is suited for general-purpose applications, web serving, containerized microservices, and database workloads requiring stable CPU performance.

tagline: A dedicated twelve-core Intel Xeon server with balanced memory and ten gigabit network bandwidth for predictable general-purpose workloads.
